body.title: Ticket audit: flag scope mismatch against assigned role ceiling
body.result: AuditResult.warnings field; size-ceiling + architectural-tag advisory checks; role inferred from ticket.role or worker; 13 new tests, 83 pass
body.description:
Extend the ticket intake audit (Granny's audit_ticket logic) to check role-fit: L/XL tickets assigned role=apprentice or role=builder are flagged with 'scope likely exceeds role ceiling — consider master or guru'. Architectural tags (Architecture, Memory, Clan, Platform) on builder/apprentice role also warn. Warning does not block filing — it's advisory, recorded in audit result.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/device.py (intake_ticket audit), CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS/audit_ticket.py if it exists
**Design rules:** none beyond standard audit extension pattern
**Scope boundary:** advisory warning only — does not block; does not auto-reassign; the human or Granny decides. Size/role ceiling table: apprentice=S only, builder=S/M, creator=M/L, master=any, guru=any.
**Completion criteria:** Granny audit result includes role-fit warning for L/XL builder tickets; test with T-vetinari-device-class ticket (L + builder) shows warning in audit result; existing S/M builder tickets pass clean
